title: 2026 New Year Balloons, New Years Eve Decorations 2026, 40 Inch Silver Large Number 18 Inch Silver Stars Foil Balloons for Eve Party Supplies Decorations
features: Packaging: You will receive a New Year decoration kit containing a silver 40-inch “2026” balloon, two 18-inch five pointed stars, one roll of silver ribbon, and one straw. This complete set makes decorating your venue effortless.

Premium Materials: This 2026 New Year balloon is crafted from high-quality, non-toxic materials. Crafted with precision, its edges are smooth and even, minimizing the risk of bursting or deflation. Durable and safe to use, it ensures your party runs smoothly without worry.

Themed Design: These New Year balloons can be hung on walls, doors, tables, or any corner to create a unique New Year's Eve party style. Their sturdy construction ensures the balloons maintain their full shape and glossy finish, making them an ideal choice for creating a festive atmosphere at your New Year's Eve celebration.

Easy Assembly: The 2026 New Year balloons inflate and deflate effortlessly. Simply pinch the inflation valve, insert the straw into the bottom opening, and inflate or deflate. Featuring an automatic seal design, the valve closes tightly upon removal to prevent air leakage after inflation.

Versatile: The 2026 New Year Party Decoration Set is perfect not only for New Year's Eve celebrations but also for graduation parties, Lunar New Year gatherings, Christmas events, and other festive occasions. It beautifully decorates spaces and doubles as a photo prop, creating lasting memories for your celebrations.
